title: Blåhaj
body: # Blåhaj A Minecraft mod that adds the IKEA BLÅHAJ Soft toy shark and a giant bread pillow as items. ![Players holding Blåhaj](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Hibiii/Blahaj/main/.pretty_readme/banner.png) This mod was designed because yes. I wanted to be cute in the game and I thought I should get an IKEA shark in game and hold it tight because they're soft and cute! When you craft or rename a plushie, it'll have your username attached to it. This mod is required on **both** the server and the client. ## Content in this mod Item | Preview | Obtaining | |---|---|---| | Soft Toy Shark | | ![Crafting recipe for Blåhaj](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Hibiii/Blahaj/main/.pretty_readme/recipe_blue_shark.png) | | Gray Toy Shark | | ![Trade offer for Klappar Haj](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Hibiii/Blahaj/main/.pretty_readme/trade_gray_shark.png) | | Soft Toy Blue Whale | | ![Crafting recipe for Blåvingad](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Hibiii/Blahaj/main/.pretty_readme/recipe_blue_whale.png) | | Bread Pillow | | ![Crafting recipe for Bread Pillow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Hibiii/Blahaj/main/.pretty_readme/recipe_bread.png) | ## License This mod is licensed under the [Unlicense](./LICENSE). Feel free to learn from it and incorporate it in your own projects. The icon of this project is the Blobhaj by Heatherhorns, and is licensed under a [Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License](http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).
